# BizAI PH

> We don't do marketing. We build revenue machines. BizAI PH gives Philippine businesses AI-powered digital presence, automation, and smart marketing — one system that finds customers, answers every inquiry, and grows your revenue automatically.

## Services

- Get Found (₱3,999): Website + Google Business Profile + Google Maps setup
- Get Customers (₱2,999/mo): AI Messenger bot + automated follow-up + reviews
- Get Sales (₱7,999/mo): Advanced AI across Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp
- Get Automated: Full automation — coming soon
